core_payload.content:
# Planning Horizon Engine

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Planning Horizon Engine becomes the explicit coordination layer that can hold the entire Dream field, pass it through Real, and continuously generate stable horizon views from `today` to `1000 days`.

## Desired Future State
- more trustworthy Dream-to-Real compression instead of ad hoc prioritization
- better explanation of why something belongs in `today`, `next week`, or a long-range horizon
- tighter feedback loops so execution updates reshape roadmaps automatically without collapsing branch discipline
- clearer orchestration between Daily Planner Agent, Roadmap Planner Agent, Suggestion Agent, Reminder Agent, and Branch Steward Agent

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves the idea that planning in N1Hub should become a true horizon engine rather than a loose mix of roadmaps, tasks, and reminders. The future value is not just more planning data; it is more intelligent compression of the entire vault into grounded action.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Planning Horizon Engine in the Dream branch captures a more mature coordination layer for N1Hub planning. It imagines stronger Dream-to-Real compression, cleaner explanations of horizon placement, and tighter orchestration between roadmap, daily planning, suggestion, reminder, and branch-governance agents. The capsule matters because planning should become a system of explicit horizon transformation instead of a pile of partially connected planning surfaces. Dream therefore preserves the future engine that can translate the whole vault into grounded present-tense action without losing long-range coherence.
